overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Kronenwetter's Community Life, Infrastructure and Public Property Committee was scheduled to hold a public hearing and vote on proposed revisions to Chapter 382 of its ordinances governing nuisances, as well as address traffic control concerns on County Road XX and Terrebonne Drive. The meeting also included routine reports from police, fire, and public works leadership.
committee: Community Life, Infrastructure and Public Property (CLIPP) Committee

agenda.item: Call to order, Pledge of Allegiance, and Roll Call
Public hearing announcement for Chapter 382 Nuisances revisions
Public comment period (up to 15 minutes total, 3 minutes per person)
Approval of June 1, 2026 Committee meeting minutes
Traffic control on County Road XX and Terrebonne Drive
Consideration of items for future agenda

discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to hold a public hearing and consider revisions to Chapter 382 of the General Code of Ordinances. The proposed amendments to sections 382-1 through 382-6 and 382-8 were set to remove the word 'public' from the language and provide clarification within the ordinance.

discussions.item: Traffic Control on County Road XX and Terrebonne Drive
discussions.body: The committee was set to discuss and take possible action on traffic control measures affecting County Road XX and Terrebonne Drive. Details regarding the specific traffic control concerns or proposed solutions were not provided in the agenda announcement.
The Police Chief was scheduled to present a report to the committee. The specific content of this report was not outlined in the agenda.
The Fire Chief was scheduled to present a report to the committee. The specific content of this report was not outlined in the agenda.
The Public Works Director was scheduled to present a report to the committee. The specific content of this report was not outlined in the agenda.

publicComment: Public comment was scheduled for up to 15 minutes total, with a three-minute limit per person, at the discretion of the Chief Presiding Officer.
actionItems: Expected to vote on approval of June 1, 2026 meeting minutes
Scheduled to vote on revisions to Chapter 382 Nuisances ordinance
Set to consider and possibly act on traffic control measures on County Road XX and Terrebonne Drive
title: REVISED Community Life, Infrastructure and Public Property (CLIPP) Committee Meeting - 2026-07-06
